title: Add Tools to Your Agent
lede: Give your Smart Agent the ability to take actions - end calls, book appointments, transfer, or call your own APIs - using predefined tools and custom HTTP tools.

steps.title: Open the Tools / MCP Panel
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open your agent.
  2. Click Tools / MCP in the editor.
  3. The panel has three areas in the left rail: Predefined, Custom, and MCP Servers.

images.caption: The Tools / MCP panel with Predefined, Custom, and MCP Servers.
The Tools / MCP panel with Predefined, Custom, and MCP Servers.

steps.title: Attach Predefined Tools
steps.content:
1. Open the Predefined section to see the built-in tools (for example an end-call tool, a calendar/booking tool, and call-transfer tools).
  2. Click a tool to attach it. Attached tools show an Added / Attached badge.
  3. Some tools have inline settings (such as a transfer number or calendar category) you can fill in after attaching.

images.caption: Attached tools appear on the agent and are usable during calls.
Attached tools appear on the agent and are usable during calls.

steps.title: Add a Custom Tool
steps.content:
1. Open the Custom section and click Add Custom Tool.
  2. Give the tool a clear name and description so the AI knows when to call it.
  3. Provide the endpoint URL and any parameters. Save the tool.
  4. During a call the agent can now hit that endpoint live to fetch or send information.

steps.title: Test the Tools
steps.content:
1. Open Test Agent and connect.
  2. Try prompts that should trigger a tool, such as "Book a demo for tomorrow at 1 PM" or "End the call."
  3. Confirm the action happens - for example a new entry in the CRM calendar.
